## Test Plan

<!-- How did you verify the changes work? -->

- [ ] Unit tests pass (`pytest tests/unit/ -v`)
- [ ] Integration tests pass (`pytest tests/integration/ -v`)
- [ ] Frontend build passes (`npm run build`)
- [ ] TypeScript check passes (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] Manually tested the affected flow in the UI

## Checklist

- [ ] No sensitive data (API keys, secrets) in commits
- [ ] No `console.log` / debug prints left in
- [ ] No TODO comments left without tracking issues
- [ ] Migrations included if DB schema changed (`alembic upgrade head` tested)
- [ ] Swagger docs updated if new endpoints added
- [ ] Environment variables documented if new ones added
